title: Make a task idempotent
description: Convert a re-running task into one that converges and reports changed only when it acts.
body: Steps: 1. Run the play twice and find tasks that report changed on the second run. 2. For each, check whether a native module can declare the state instead of a command. 3. Replace the command with the module, or guard it with creates/changed_when. 4. Re-run twice and confirm the task is changed only on the first. 5. Add the task to check-mode coverage. Rollback point: keep the prior task until the idempotent version is confirmed. Validation: a second consecutive run reports zero changed for the task.
